mapper.insert: INSERT INTO watch_history (film_id, user_id, viewer_hash, progress_seconds, duration_seconds, provider_type, video_url, last_watched_at, completed) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{userId}, #{viewerHash}, #{progressSeconds}, #{durationSeconds}, #{providerType}, #{videoUrl}, NOW(), #{completed})
mapper.update: UPDATE watch_history SET progress_seconds = #{progressSeconds}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, provider_type = #{providerType}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, last_watched_at = NOW(), completed = #{completed} WHERE id = #{id}
